## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to page '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Paste the full error traceback if applicable:

```
paste traceback here
```

## Environment
| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.10.12 |
| PyTorch version | e.g. 2.3.1 |
| Streamlit version | e.g. 1.36.0 |
| GPU (y/n) | |
| CUDA version (if GPU) | e.g. 12.1 |

## Additional Context
Any other relevant context (dataset size, model used, etc.)
